## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo build --release`
- [ ] `npm pack`
- [ ] Not applicable or not run:

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I signed off my commits with `git commit -s`.
- [ ] I updated docs, examples, or tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] This is not a public report of a security vulnerability.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out risky areas, follow-up work, screenshots, or terminal transcripts.
